title: Copy format from on excel to another
author: joeSaad
body:
I'm wondering if this option exists. I'm trying to copy excel and writeFile() but the copied file seems to be corrupt with error: 

![image](https://cloud.githubusercontent.com/assets/1170032/19818653/4c1294b2-9d16-11e6-8bcc-acb2ced8cf7c.png)

Then when clicking "Open and Repair", the file gets open with distorted format all broken. 
Is there a fix for that? or am I missing something? 

Thanks,
